title: Container Report - Week 30
summary:
Main
As we enter the summer lull, we wonder whether we have seen an early peak season this year, or will we see an agreement between China and the USA put in place that will reduce tariffs back to lower levels that could then give us the traditional peak season in September - October. We have just witnessed shippers moving more containers than normal to avoid these huge tariffs, the Port of LA saw its busiest ever day in July. The US and EU are closing in on a 15 per cent tariff deal, whilst other deals have been done with Vietnam and Japan in recent weeks.
